productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Pv Plan Mix & Max Black Trousers
description: CompositionBlack full length formal trousers made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two  buttoned welt pockets on the back, and metal zipper and button closureFittingRegularWash careHand/machine wash  in cold water with mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringDrip dry in shadeWarm ironClassy trousers are the mark of a gentleman. These black formal trousers from indigo nation will go a long way in making you the most sophisticated-looking man at any gathering. Made from the choicest of selected fabrics, they are perfectly fitted for office wear and any other formal occasion when you want to look your best effortlessly. Pair them with a crisp formal shirt and leather shoes to look spectacular.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 41.5"Height-6.1", waist-31"
